overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a medieval village at night. The character walks through narrow cobblestone streets, explores a waterfront dock with a water wheel, crosses a stone bridge, and approaches a battle scene with soldiers. Atmospheric lighting combines torchlight with moonlit blue tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street between historic stone buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village street, passing NPCs standing near walls

notable_agents.action: woman in dress leaning against stone wall
man holding a torch near a wooden door

entered.detail: tall stone wall with weathered texture and small windows
rough stone facade with wooden beams and lantern mounts
iron cage lantern suspended over the street emitting warm light
wall-mounted torch burning brightly against the stone

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow medieval street flanked by tall stone buildings. Warm torchlight contrasts with the cool night sky. NPCs stand along the walls, and a hanging lantern illuminates the cobblestone path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock extending over water with canvas canopy

events.description: transitions from stone street onto wooden waterfront dock

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock, looking out at the water and distant buildings

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a pier over the water
tattered canvas roof supported by wooden posts providing partial cover
large wooden water wheel attached to a building at the dock's end
dark rippling water reflecting the night sky alongside the dock
rough wooden fence lining the edge of the dock

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto a wooden dock extending over dark water. A canvas awning provides partial cover while a large water wheel turns slowly at the pier's end. The wooden planks creak as Geralt explores the waterfront area.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone path leading to stone bridge over water

events.description: exits wooden dock and returns to cobblestone village path
steps onto stone bridge crossing the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the path and crossing the stone bridge toward distant buildings

entered.detail: traditional timber-framed house with thatched roof and lit windows
arched stone bridge with mossy surfaces spanning the water
tall wooden post with directional signs near the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the dock, Geralt walks along a cobblestone path past a wooden farmhouse. The character crosses a mossy stone bridge over dark water, heading toward a distant tower visible against the night sky.

events.description: encounters group of soldiers in red cloaks standing near barricades
discovers dead bodies on the ground and draws weapon

agents.ego_description: approaching the battle scene, drawing sword and moving through the combat area

notable_agents.action: soldier in red cloak standing guard near the path
soldier walking through the battlefield with weapon drawn

entered.detail: makeshift wooden fence blocking part of the path
fallen soldiers lying on the grass and dirt
flaming torch on a post illuminating the battle scene

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches a battlefield where soldiers in red cloaks stand among wooden barricades. Dead bodies lie on the dirt path near a burning torch. The character draws a sword and moves through the grim scene toward the distant tower.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet medieval village that gradually transforms into a grim battlefield. It begins with Geralt walking through a narrow cobblestone street where warm torchlight contrasts with the cool blue of the night sky. As he leaves the stone buildings behind, the scene shifts to a wooden dock extending over dark water, passing under a canvas awning toward a slowly turning water wheel. The camera then follows him away from the waterfront and across a mossy stone bridge, moving past a wooden farmhouse toward a distant tower. Finally, the environment opens into a battlefield of wooden barricades and fallen bodies, where Geralt draws his sword and advances through the smoke of burning torches.
